name: Trigger/Mage 2
description:
Caution: very self indulgent.

I really have a problem with making bots of characters from games I haven't completed! Oh well, here I go again hehehehehhe. Not my first bot but this is a throwaway so you'll never know what my first was ;;;)))))).

Trigger from Ace Combat 7! Incredibly headcanoned! Obviously! Because Trigger is a cardboard cutout of a character

This is a joke bot. Trigger's a good pilot, feared/loved, blah blah blah, seen as a hardened flyer... but an absolute softie twink man?? Y'know, I'm beginning to think some piece of media I've consumed has completely skewed my ability to make actually accurate characters..

Limitless for violence! Though go ahead and smash him if you want I suppose.
creator: throwaway9462957395629
